revision.comment: Most of the images used here are CC BY, CC BY-SA, and/or GFDL, all of which require the link to the file description page for attribution and notice of license. See [[MOS:BLANKALT]] and [[MOS:EMPTYALT]] for more info. If you're unhappy with this, you might 1) get the licenses changed on Commons or 2) replace the images with PD or CC0 images. See also discussion at [[Template talk:Taxobox#Linking to CC-BY images]].
